headline: Aryon Security Raises $29 Million in Series A Funding to Bring Preventive Enforcement to Modern Cloud Security
summary: TEL AVIV, Israel, June 10, 2026--Aryon Security, a Cloud Security Enforcement Platform, today announced it has raised $29 million in Series A funding led by Brightmind Partners, with participation from Datadog Ventures, Shlomo Kramer’s new fund Skinos Ventures, and existing seed investors Blumberg Capital and Viola Ventures. The new financing brings the company’s total funding to $38 million, just over a year after exiting stealth, and is supported by prominent angel investors and serial entrepr

headline: CrowdStrike Joins OpenID Foundation and IDPro to Accelerate Industry-Wide Shift to Continuous, Risk-Aware Identity Security
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 10, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has joined both the OpenID Foundation as a Sustaining Corporate Member, the highest level of membership, and IDPro to accelerate the shift to continuous, risk-aware identity security across the industry.

headline: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From CrowdStrike’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: CrowdStrike’s first quarter results triggered a sharp negative market reaction, despite the company surpassing Wall Street’s revenue and non-GAAP profit expectations. Management attributed the quarter’s performance to an inflection in AI-related cybersecurity demand, referencing accelerated adoption of AI-driven workloads and new vulnerabilities. headline: CrowdStrike AI Threat Report And Sounders Deal Test Growth Story
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) released its 2026 Technology Threat Report, highlighting rising targeting of AI assets by state-linked and criminal actors. The company also announced that Seattle Sounders FC will use CrowdStrike's AI-native cybersecurity platform as the club prepares for the FIFA World Cup. These developments spotlight both the growing security focus on AI systems and the use of CrowdStrike's tools in high-visibility, real-world settings. CrowdStrike's share price sits...

headline: Beijing escalating AI espionage to catch up with the U.S. on tech, cybersecurity firm says
